task_completion.description: Weasis application is open and the DICOM series is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis UI is visible on the screen with DICOM images loaded (look for PatientID 'GRID001' or synthetic shapes in the viewer).

task_completion.description: The layout configuration menu or grid selection tool is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layout button in Weasis is clicked, showing a dropdown or grid selection menu (e.g., 2x2, 3x3 options).

task_completion.description: The Weasis display layout is configured to a tiled grid of at least 2x2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewing area in Weasis is split into at least 4 distinct panes or tiles (a 2x2 grid or larger).

task_completion.description: Multiple slices (at least 4) of the DICOM series are simultaneously visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 4 of the grid panes contain distinct slices/images from the loaded DICOM series.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the viewer is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command (e.g., scrot, import, or cp), or file manager showing a screenshot being saved to or existing at '~/DICOM/exports/grid_layout.png' or '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/grid_layout.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis GUI to configure the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: The grid layout is clearly part of the Weasis application interface, not stitched together in an image editor like GIMP.

integrity.description: The grid layout is achieved within a single Weasis window.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is only one Weasis application window open containing the 2x2 grid, rather than 4 separate Weasis windows arranged side-by-side on the desktop.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the agent's work.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final saved image matches the Weasis viewer state and layout seen in earlier trajectory screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a screenshot saved exactly to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/grid_layout.png'. The loaded DICOM series contains synthetic shapes and has the PatientID 'GRID001'. The final screenshot file must be at least 10240 bytes in size and have minimum dimensions of 800x600 pixels.
